briefdescription.para: Default topology function that connects all node pairs.
Defines the graph_template class and graph_t structure for graph-based analysis.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains the declaration of the graph_template class and graph_t structure, which form the foundation of graph-based machine learning analysis in AnalysisG. The graph template defines how physics events are converted into graph representations, while graph_t holds the actual tensor data for training and inference.

sect1.title: Overview
sect1.para:
Graph construction in AnalysisG follows this workflow:
Define which particles become nodes via define_particle_nodes()
Define edge topology via define_topology()
Add node/edge/graph features using template methods
Export to graph_t for batching and GPU transfer

sect1.title: Feature Types
sect1.para:
Features are prefixed to indicate their purpose:
D-*: Data features (model inputs)
T-*: Truth features (training targets)
